title: althaea glabriflora
intro: Althaea glabriflora, also known as the smooth marshmallow or Marshmallow plant, is a species of perennial herb belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and demulcent compounds that help soothe and protect mucous membranes. The health benefits of Althaea glabriflora include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and diarrhea, as well as its potential to alleviate skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Althaea glabriflora can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as in topical creams and ointments.
